title: languas havilandii
intro: Languas havilandii, also known as Lesser Ginger or Haviland's Languas, is a type of rhizomatous plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. It is a tropical plant native to the Philippines, with medicinal properties attributed to its rhizome, which contains compounds like zingiberene and shogaol. The rhizome of Languas havilandii has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and nausea, due to its anti-inflammatory and carminative properties. The herbal preparations of Languas havilandii include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion and other gastrointestinal disorders.
